name: token-reporter
description: Per-operation token usage reporter for Claude Code 2.1.108+. Shows token counts, cost estimates, tool + skill + agent attribution, cache invalidation detection, worktree sub-agent breakdown, compact_boundary markers, CLAUDE.md reload events, and file activity when agents complete. Only outputs in debug mode (claude --debug).

OUTPUT_LIMIT_CHARS.title: Hook output character limit
OUTPUT_LIMIT_CHARS.description: Maximum character count for the report injected into the transcript. Claude Code's hooks reference states 10,000 chars; the 2.1.90 changelog says 50,000. Keep low (10000) for safety, raise to 48000 if your Claude Code version supports it.

SKILLS_BOX.title: Show Skills in a dedicated box
SKILLS_BOX.description: When enabled, per-skill cost breakdown is rendered in its own standalone unicode box instead of as an inline section in the main report. Useful for sessions with many skill invocations where the inline section would crowd the main box.

MAX_ENTRIES_PER_SECTION.title: Max entries per section in inline output
MAX_ENTRIES_PER_SECTION.description: Lists in the inline boxes (skills, bash commands, web fetches, files, sub-agents) are capped at this many entries, with a '+N more — see HTML report' indicator when truncated. The full untruncated data is always available in the HTML report file at ./reports/token-reporter/. Set to 0 to disable truncation entirely.
